name: Flourless Chocolate Decadence Cake
recipeIngredient: 3 tbsp Liqueur of choice (e.g., Tia Maria or Baileys)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Butter an 8-inch cake pan with 2-inch high sides.
3. Line the pan bottom with waxed paper and butter the paper.
4. Dust the pan with flour and tap out excess.
5. Melt chocolate and butter in a microwave.
6. Mix cocoa, eggs, and sugar; whisk in the chocolate mixture.
7. Add liqueur to the batter.
8. Pour batter into the prepared pan and bake for 35 minutes or until a tester comes out clean.
9. Cool cake in the pan for 1 hour.
10. Turn the cake onto a plate and peel off the paper.
11. Refrigerate for 2 hours.
12. Meanwhile, bring cream to a boil, add chocolate, and stir until melted.
13. Pour glaze over the cooled cake and spread with a spatula to coat the sides.
This is truly magnificent!
